perturbation.original_text: The Client shall provide the Confidential Information at its own discretion and is not required to provide any information under this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The Organization shall provide the Confidential Information at its own discretion and is not required to provide any information under this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Client' to 'Organization' introduces conflict. Throughout the document, obligations and rights are assigned to 'the Client'. Replacing it with 'Organization' in Section 3 causes uncertainty regarding which entity is obligated to provide confidential information, contradicting any place where the original 'Client' is mentioned.
perturbation.contradicted_text: WHO IS ENTITLED TO HAVE ACCESS TO THE CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION The Company undertakes to provide access to the Confidential Information solely: (а) to its employees who require access to the Confidential Information to perform the Project; and (b) to its authorized representatives and subcontractors, who (i) require access to the Confidential Information to implement the Project, and who (ii) had been approve d in advance in writing by the Client to perform the work on the Project, and (iii) have signed non -disclosure agreements, reflecting the actual transfer of such Confidential Information and establishing the procedure for its use, at the very least on term s and conditions analogous to the terms and conditions of this Agreement. The Company undertakes to provide access to the Confidential Information solely to THE COMPANY representative s, as they are defined below, for the purpose of conducting negotiations, contract preparation and taking part in the work under the Contract for the Client, as well as reviewing the quality of procedures, and THE COMPANY professional consultants on confide ntial terms and conditions analogous to terms and conditions of this Agreement , for the purpose of THE COMPANY getting necessary consultation in connection with the implementation of the Project . At the same time, “THE COMPANY Representatives” – are THE CO MPANY as the Party under this Agreement; all member firm s of the network affiliated with THE COMPANY International Cooperative and all controlled by such member firms individuals, including all partners, directors, employees and agents of such member firms and controlled by such individuals , and “THE COMPANY Representative” means any of the mentioned above. THE COMPANY ensures that every THE COMPANY Representative and THE COMPANY professional consultant, having access to the Confidential Information above, is informed about terms and conditions of this Agreement and complied with them. Further to the request of the Client, The Company within 5 days should submit a report on the access of third parties to the Confidential Information, including the surname o f the employee/name of the counterparty, the materials studied thereby, the grounds for the need to study them, the date and time of receipt and return of such materials. The Company is liable for the compliance by said individuals with confidentiality req uirements.
perturbation.justification: The original text assigns obligations and rights to 'the Client'. The changed text replaces 'Client' with 'Organization'. The contradicted text references 'the Client' multiple times, assigning them specific rights and requiring actions from them. By changing 'Client' to 'Organization' in the modified text, it creates ambiguity and contradiction in the document, as it becomes unclear which entity is responsible for fulfilling the obligations and exercising the rights originally assigned to 'the Client' in the contradicted text, leading to a strong in-text contradiction. This adheres to the definition of Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The Company undertakes to provide access to the Confidential Information solely to THE COMPANY representative s, as they are defined below, for the purpose of conducting negotiations, contract preparation and taking part in the work under the Contract for the Client
perturbation.changed_text: The Company undertakes to provide access to the Confidential Information solely to THE COMPANY representative s, as they are defined below, for the purpose of conducting negotiations, contract preparation and taking part in the work under the Contract for the Customer
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Client' to 'Customer' introduces ambiguity in Section 5. If 'Client' and 'Customer' aren't explicitly defined as interchangeable, it creates uncertainty regarding to whom The Company's representatives provide services. This conflicts anywhere where 'Client' is meant to have a specific and limited role (e.g., the organizer of the tender).
perturbation.contradicted_text: WHAT IS THE LIABILITY OF THE SUPPLIER FOR VIOLATION OF THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THIS AGREEMENT The Company is fully aware that the Client could incur losses as a result of the violation of this Agreement. Consequen tly, in the event of the disclosure of information related to the Confidential Information, THE COMPANY undertakes liability for any real damage suffered by the Client, and occurred directly by disclosure of Confidential Information on behalf of THE COMPAN Y in violation of this Agreement, however, the amount of reimbursement will be defined in accordance with the Consulting Services Agreement , in relation to which Confidential Information was provided by the Client. Under no circumstances THE COMPANY shall reimburse the Client against lost profit and consequential damages. In order to receive reimbursement of real damage, suffered by the Client in connection to this Agreement, the Client shall provide THE COMPANY with documents and/or other proof, confirming the presence and amount of real damage.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Client' to 'Customer' introduces ambiguity because these terms are used seemingly interchangeably in the contract, but it is not explicitly defined if they are the same. The Contradicted Text refers specifically to 'Client' and their potential losses and rights to reimbursement. If 'Customer' is not the same as 'Client', it creates a contradiction and uncertainty as to whether the liability terms outlined in the Contradicted Text apply to 'Customer' as well, causing an in-text contradiction according to the provided 'Misaligned Terminology' definition and Perturbation Explanation. Therefore, the changed text breaks compatibility with the contradicted text.

perturbation.original_text: The Company is fully aware that the Client could incur losses as a result of the violation of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The Company is fully aware that the Project could incur losses as a result of the violation of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Client' to 'Project' alters the party who could incur losses due to a violation. 'The Client' is a specific legal entity, whereas 'the Project' is an endeavor. This introduces uncertainty regarding liability and conflicts with the premise of the agreement meant to protect the client's confidential information.
perturbation.contradicted_text: WHAT IS THE LIABILITY OF THE SUPPLIER FOR VIOLATION OF THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THIS AGREEMENT The Company is fully aware that the Project could incur losses as a result of the violation of this Agreement. Consequen tly, in the event of the disclosure of information related to the Confidential Information, THE COMPANY undertakes liability for any real damage suffered by the Client, and occurred directly by disclosure of Confidential Information on behalf of THE COMPAN Y in violation of this Agreement, however, the amount of reimbursement will be defined in accordance with the Consulting Services Agreement , in relation to which Confidential Information was provided by the Client. Under no circumstances THE COMPANY shall reimburse the Client against lost profit and consequential damages. In order to receive reimbursement of real damage, suffered by the Client in connection to this Agreement, the Client shall provide THE COMPANY with documents and/or other proof, confirming the presence and amount of real damage.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated 'The Company is fully aware that the Client could incur losses as a result of the violation of this Agreement.' The changed text replaces 'Client' with 'Project'. The contradicted text explicitly states, 'THE COMPANY undertakes liability for any real damage suffered by the Client'. By changing 'Client' to 'Project' in the changed text, the company's liability for damages is no longer clearly defined in relation to the 'Client,' as the text implies liability for 'Project' losses. This creates a contradiction because the contradicted text refers to the Client, while the changed text refers to the Project, making it unclear who bears the risk and liability. This aligns with the Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction definition because 'Client' and 'Project' are used interchangeably, leading to conflicting obligations concerning liability.

perturbation.original_text: If the Client provides Confidential Information belonging to any of its affiliates, subsidiaries or third party, such individuals or legal entities are third parties that have corresponding rights under this A greement.
perturbation.changed_text: If the Organization provides Confidential Information belonging to any of its affiliates, subsidiaries or third party, such individuals or legal entities are third parties that have corresponding rights under this A greement.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Client' to 'Organization' creates uncertainty about who is providing the confidential information. The document consistently refers to 'the Client', and this isolated change contradicts that established terminology, especially concerning the corresponding rights of third parties.
perturbation.contradicted_text: APPENDIX A TO NON -DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT No. ___ The Autonomous Non -Profit Organization Local Organizing Committee -2018 (hereinafter the “Client” ) and the Сompany _________________________________________________________ _________________________________________ ______ , have approved the description of the Project (this Appendix A to the Non -Disclosure Agreement) Description of the Project All documents and/or information directly or indirectly related to the performance of the aforementioned project are confidential, including, but not limited to: - Documentation of Public Tender No. ОТ/12, including all annexes and clarifications. - Name of the Client company; - Statement of Work and characteristics included in the Public Tender Documentation. Commenceme nt Date of the Provision of the Confidential Information: _______________________________ (The Client) Autonomous Non -Profit Organization Local Organizing Committee -2018 Legal address: 7, Narodnaya Street, Moscow 115172 Signature: _____________________________ Full name: Position: Date: ____ ________ 2016 (The “Company” ) ______________________________________ Legal address: __________________________ Signature: _____________________________ Full name: _____________________________ Position: Director Date: ____ ________ 201 6 Date solely for the statement: _______
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to 'Client' consistently. The changed text replaces 'Client' with 'Organization' in one instance. The 'Contradicted Text' explicitly defines 'Client' as 'The Autonomous Non -Profit Organization Local Organizing Committee -2018'. The inconsistent use of 'Organization' creates a direct contradiction because the document now lacks clarity on which entity provides Confidential Information and which has corresponding rights, creating uncertainty, and misaligning terminology which causes a clear conflict, fitting the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Client' to 'Beneficiary' in Appendix A introduces ambiguity about which company's name is confidential. This contradicts the main body of the agreement, which focuses on protecting 'the Client's' information, not necessarily the information of a 'Beneficiary', where it hasn't been defined.
perturbation.contradicted_text: WHAT CONSTITUTES CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION The Company undertakes to consider as confidential any confidential, private, inte rnal information, trade secret or other classified information, materials or samples that The Company receives, sees, hears or that it studies in writing or learns about in some other way in connection with the Project, and that relates to the Client or an y of its affiliates or subsidiaries, irrespective of whether such information, such materials or samples were received from the Client, its affiliates or subsidiaries or from third parties on the Client’s instructions (hereinafter the “Confidential Informa tion”). All information obtained through a statement, processing, generalizations or analytical calculations from the Confidential Information is also confidential .
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to the 'Client' company, while the changed text refers to the 'Beneficiary' company. The contradicted text defines confidential information in relation to 'the Client'. By changing 'Client' to 'Beneficiary' without defining 'Beneficiary' within the context of confidential information, it creates ambiguity and contradicts the original intent of protecting the 'Client's' confidential information, as the contradicted text explicitly defines confidential information in relation to the Client and its affiliates. This aligns with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction', which states that using multiple terms interchangeably without defining them leads to conflicting obligations.
